text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer! And with that...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, I'm so sleeeepy. I was studying with Rice for
the test during my break.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I memorized a whole three pages! But now my
brain hurts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems like Haru Urara needs a proper rest.
